executionModelDetail: Parent-expanded by bubbles.workflow because the workflow runtime lacked the runSubagent tool — the analyst/design/plan/implement/test/validate roles were executed directly in-session (the documented smackerel precedent, e.g. spec 097). SCOPE-01 (in-repo instrumentation contract) is complete + offline-proven; SCOPE-02 (live evo-x2 verification) is Blocked/DEFERRED-to-flip because live host mutation is out of scope this session.
reconciliation: Reconciliation, not greenfield. Current-truth audit found /metrics (internal/api/router.go), the OTLP/gRPC exporter (internal/assistant/tracing), and the otel-go SDK already shipped. Genuine gaps closed: knb 3-var contract naming (replacing declared-not-consumed OTEL_EXPORTER_ENDPOINT), a fail-loud internal/observability reader, OTEL_ENABLED-gated boot validation, and com.bubbles.* discovery labels. Existing exporter + /metrics REUSED, not forked (knb FINDING-014-03-1). Operator decision option (a); knb adapter side needs zero rework.

scopeProgress.name: In-repo instrumentation contract (naming + fail-loud reader + labels)
Live shared-stack verification (evo-x2)
scopeProgress.blockedReason: DEFERRED-to-flip: live /metrics 200 scraped by the shared Prometheus + OTLP spans in the shared Tempo require an operator flip (sharedServices.observability: shared + apply-shared-obs on evo-x2). No live host mutation this session.

deferredScopes.reason: live evo-x2 verification apply-gated; no live host mutation this session
deferredScopes.unblock: operator flips sharedServices.observability: shared + runs apply-shared-obs on evo-x2
